title: Memorial Day Weekend Kickoff
subtitle: Saturday, May 23rd - Two Events. One Night.
description: The holiday weekend starts here. Cookout vibes from 3-8PM, then the night party experience takes over at 9PM. Live DJ spinning 90s R&B and 2000s Hip Hop all night. VIP sections available.

schedule.name: Cookout Party
schedule.description: Drink specials, grilled eats, and patio vibes

schedule.name: Night Party Experience
schedule.description: Live DJ - 90s R&B - 2000s Hip Hop - VIP Sections

faq.question: What is the age requirement?
faq.answer: This is a 30+ event. Valid ID required at the door.

faq.question: What is the dress code?
faq.answer: Dress to Impress. Security is enforced - no athletic wear, no jerseys, no slides for men.

faq.question: Is there parking?
faq.answer: Yes, free parking is available on site.

faq.question: What time does the cookout start?
faq.answer: The Cookout Party runs 3PM - 8PM. Night Party begins at 9PM and goes until 2AM.

faq.question: How do I reserve VIP?
faq.answer: Use the VIP inquiry form on this page or DM us on Instagram.

faq.question: Is bottle service available?
faq.answer: Yes. VIP sections include bottle service options. Reserve early - sections are limited.

seoTitle: Memorial Day Weekend Kickoff | The Brass Elephant Lounge & Grill
seoDescription: Cookout Party 3-8PM + Night Party Experience 9PM-2AM. Live DJ, 90s R&B, 2000s Hip Hop, VIP sections. The Brass Elephant Lounge & Grill, Vance SC. RSVP now.
